entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A globally important cereal (Pennisetum glaucum) whose production is constrained by downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola that severely constrains pearl millet production

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: 3,5-DICHLOROANTHRANILIC ACID
entities.description: An immunity elicitor used to activate defense mechanisms in pearl millet

entities.name: CELL WALL GLUCAN
entities.description: An immunity elicitor used to activate defense mechanisms in pearl millet

entities.name: LIPOPOLYSACCHARIDE
entities.description: An immunity elicitor used to activate defense mechanisms in pearl millet

entities.name: GLYCINEBETAINE
entities.description: An immunity elicitor that promotes increase in enzyme activities and gene expression for downy mildew resistance

entities.name: ENZYMATIC AND PROTEIN STUDIES
entities.description: The analytical approach used to decipher the immunity eliciting properties of various compounds

entities.name: ELICITOR TREATMENT
entities.description: The application of elicitors to activate defense mechanisms in plants

entities.name: DEFENSE MECHANISMS
entities.description: Biological responses, including enzyme activity and gene expression, activated to resist pathogens

entities.name: BETA-1,3-GLUCANASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose activity and gene expression are elicited by immunity elicitors

entities.name: PHENYLALANINE AMMONIA LYASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose activity and gene expression are elicited by immunity elicitors

entities.name: PEROXIDASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose activity and gene expression are elicited by immunity elicitors

entities.name: POLYPHENOL OXIDASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose activity and gene expression are elicited by immunity elicitors

entities.name: LIPOXYGENASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose activity and gene expression are elicited by immunity elicitors

entities.name: HYDROXYPROLINE-RICH GLYCOPROTEINS
entities.description: Defense proteins whose activity and gene expression are elicited by immunity elicitors

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist the downy mildew pathogen, positively correlated with defense gene expression
